## Decisions

- **D4** — `.skill` artifact format renamed to `.zip` (the underlying archive format was always ZIP; the `.skill` extension is Claude-Code-specific; Hermes packages skills as plain `.zip`).
- **D5** — Add `compatibility` field to skill frontmatter so downstream hosts can declare dual-runtime support without forking the skill.
- **D11** — When dual-compatible, expose `compatibility` as the canonical mechanism (preferred over `claude_compatible`-style sidecar flags).
- **D15** — Replace `claude -p` invocations with `hermes chat -q`; preserves the same prompt-in / stdout-out contract and `--model` argument semantics.
- **D16** — Subprocess env handling switched from stripping `CLAUDECODE` to a new helper `hermes_subprocess_env()` that preserves all vars (Hermes does not auto-strip `CLAUDECODE`); nested-Hermes scenarios use `hermes -p <profile>` or `HERMES_HOME` override.
- **D17** — Drop the `.claude/`-root discovery walker (`find_project_root()`); project root is derived inline as `skill_path.parent` for both `run_eval.py` and `run_loop.py`.
- **D18** — Delete Claude.ai- and Cowork-specific sections from `SKILL.md`; rewrite remaining `claude-with-access-to-the-skill` mentions to `hermes-with-access-to-the-skill`.
- **D20** — Wrap leaf-agent markdown files in YAML frontmatter (`name`, `description`, `goal`, `toolsets`, `role: leaf`) so Hermes can dispatch them through `delegate_task`.
- **D21** — Use Hermes CLI (`hermes chat -q`, `hermes sessions export`) in place of all `claude -p` / NDJSON-streaming code paths.
- **D22** — Skill-trigger detection now reads exported ShareGPT JSONL session transcripts and looks for assistant turns embedding a `Skill` tool_use block whose `arguments.skill` matches the candidate skill name (cleaned `skill_name-eval-<id>` form).
- **D23** — Rename eval-run ID conventions in `viewer.html` from `with_skill|without_skill|new_skill|old_skill` to `skill_active|baseline|skill_iter_n|skill_iter_prev` so the viewer stays semantically correct across Hermes iteration runs.
- **D24** — Leaf-agent delegation pattern: `delegate_task(goal=..., context=..., toolsets=[...], role="leaf", max_iterations=N)`.
